title: System update available
description:
Android™ 11 OS update is now available.

The implementation of the OS update will add new function,improve usability,and change the name of function and items.
Please check the details and notes about the update on the website of au in advance,and then implement the update.

Please back up data before implementing the OS update.
After implementing the OS update,you cannnot revert to the old one.
As the update file size is large,please use Wi-Fi®.

During the OS update,you cannnot do anything including calling to 110,119 and 118,and sending and receiving emails.
Please implement the OS update when the battery is fully charged.
